career.desc: Coordinating cloud and edge computing units. Supervising undergraduate through postgraduate students. Leading outreach to industry, government, and research institutes.
Designed and delivered Simulation and Evidence-Based Decision Making. Published in IEEE Trans. Cybernetics, IEEE TDSC, and IEEE/CAA JAS. Achieved 100% broad agreement on teaching quality.
Pioneered human-swarm teaming research within a $500K Defence-funded project. Developed transparent AI frameworks for robotic swarming and privacy-preserving GAN methods for EEG signals.
Built machine learning models for intellectual property analytics on complex, large-scale datasets using agile methodologies.

career.org: Justice & Community Safety Directorate, ACT Government
career.desc: Established and managed the ACT Sentencing Database. Contributed to justice system initiatives through data-driven policy analysis.
Delivered courses to 120–270 students. Introduced Moodle LMS and designed new NoSQL database courses at graduate level.
